nodes.name: Black-tailed treecreeper
nodes.summary: Black-tailed treecreeper（Black-tailed treecreeper，学名 Climacteris melanurus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |last6=Franklin |first6=K.|publisher=CSIRO Publications|isbn=978-1-4863-1193-4|pages=422|year=2019|location=Victoria}} Habitat includes open grassy woodlands, savanna, dry forest, and moist lowland forest. It is the only treecreeper species found in northern Australia, and normally travels in pairs or trios, and occasionally small groups
